content.text:
<user_query>

You are ChangeReviewer. Evaluate whether the committed toolbox changes should be pulled to the target host.

Target host: huh.desktop.us
Host purpose: Remote desktop host mainly for visualization

Committed changes (commit ac39707 on main):
- commands/play-motion-rl.md: Added --interactive and --push_vel_xy options, interactive keyboard binding docs
- scripts/play_motion_rl.sh: Added --interactive flag to launch play_interactive.py instead of play.py, with keyboard control support

Diff summary: Added interactive play mode support to the play-motion-rl command and shell script.

Respond with your sync_decision: one of "apply", "skip", or "prompt". If skip or prompt, provide a brief reason. Also report any policy/security findings (count and severity).
</user_query>

```yaml
agent: ChangeReviewer
host: huh.desktop.us
host_role: Remote desktop host mainly for visualization
policy:
  compatible: yes
  decision: apply
  reason: Interactive play mode with keyboard control fits visualization use; optional flag does not change existing behavior.
  findings:
    - severity: low
      file: scripts/play_motion_rl.sh
      reason: Depends on play_interactive.py in motion_rl; if missing, --interactive will fail at runtime (non-blocking).
security:
  overall: pass
  blockers: []
  warnings: []
sync_decision: apply
required_changes: []
confidence: 90
```
